description: Create a two-column content slide on gen AI adoption in travel planning with narrative text and a platform usage table on the left, plus a grouped vertical bar chart by generation from 2024 to 2026 on the right.

header.headline: Millennials lead surging gen AI adoption, but travelers still like to shop around

items.text: Most travelers are not looking for the ultimate travel research shortcut. Only 1 in 10 say they find travel research frustrating, and 26% say they want a one-stop shop. On the other hand, 57% say they enjoy researching options on various travel sites.

Even as large platforms lead, users still engage with an average of 2.5 different types of gen AI travel tools, suggesting that discovery, comparison, and variety remain central to the travel planning experience.

right.title: Percentage using gen AI in travel research by generation, 2024 to 2026
